Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class SpecializationChecker

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractSpecializationHelper
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.SpecializationChecker
public class SpecializationChecker extends AbstractSpecializationHelper
Helper class for verifying the contents of a specialization instance.

  • Method Details

    • verify

      public static void verify(ISpecialization spe, String srcTypenvImage, String specImage, String dstTypenvImage)
      Verifies that the specialization contains exactly the expected substitutions.
      Parameters:
      spe - the specialization to check
      srcTypenvImage - the type environment of the source language
      specImage - the substitutions
      dstTypenvImage - the type environment of the destination language
